HIGH SCHOOL REIMAGINED RESPONSIBILITY FOR ONE'S ACTIONS PIONEERING MANAGEMENT EDUCATION SINCE 1999 HONESTY IN WORK ACE CULTURE SINCERITY IN RELATIONSHIPS MENTORSHIP RESPECT FOR SELF & OTHERS DESIRE. DREAM. ACHIEVE. REFLECTING ON & LEARNING FROM OUR EXPERIENCE INTERNATIONAL EXPOSURE HONESTY IN WORK RELAXING & INVIGORATING SPACES CARE FOR RESOURCES WE ARE ACE RESPECT FOR LAWS AND REGULATIONS

Personal Development

In taking a lead role in organizing events,

Action Learning

We adopt the action learning pedagogy in our classrooms.

Explore the Amazing School Clubs

The after-school clubs at AHS provides

THE INSIGHT YOU NEED TO KNOW.

One of Nepal’s leading higher secondary schools, AHS fosters environment that prepares students for meaningful learning at higher education institutions and fulfilling citizenship in the 21st century world.

Explore More

Live the Aceperience

Life at Ace is vibrant enjoyable and full of wonderful learning opportunities. One of the key ingredients of Aceperience is the discipline of balancing: our students extensively engage in co-curricular activities and learn important life skills, even while they work for achieving academic excellence. Come, live the Aceperience!

Load More

United Kingdom Thailand Thailand Our students are exposed to a diverse number of experiences at Ace, including an international experience in which students get vital insights from a global perspective, providing them a competitive advantage over the average graduate. International Exposure Explore More

After School Club

The after-school clubs at AHS provides students the opportunity to acquire skills they do not ordinarily get during regular hours in school. The activities are done during after class hours throughout the year. Students are encouraged to create their own clubs depending on their particular interests.

Arts Club

Green Club

Know our Alumni

Anushka Shrestha Miss Nepal World 2019 Founder & CEO-Makkuse Class of 2014 Malika Mahat Actress/Model Class of 2018 Subhan Joshi Entrepreneur (Baked by Subhan Joshi) Class of 2017 Oscar Shrestha Photographer/ Film Maker Class of 2018 Jini Agrawal International Development & Management Expert Class of 2007 Avash Ghimire Presenter, Paradygm TV Class of 2007 Kritika Shrestha Auditor, Ernst & Young , USA Class of 2011 Luna Niraula Lawyer Class of 2016 Amul Baidya COO, Kailash Kuti Inn Class of 2009 Sachin Shrestha Co-Founder, The Local Project Nepal Class of 2016 Kritisha Prajapati Podcaster, Entrepreneur- Krish home Studios Class of 2016 Samir Shakya Director, ISS Class of 2006
